phases.title: Add project name to center of top header bar
phases.content: In App.tsx, add the active project name to the <header> element. The project name should display centered in the header bar. Update App.css to support a three-section header layout: left (Tiki branding), center (project name), right (spacer for balance). Use activeProject.name which is already available in the component. When no project is active, show nothing in the center.
verification: Active project name is visible in the top header bar
Header layout has Tiki branding on left, project name centered
When no project is active, the center area is empty
